# volcenginecc_clb_check_log_topic (Resource)

Binding relationship between the health check log topic and the CLB instance.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "volcenginecc_clb_check_log_topic" "CLBCheckLogTopicDemo" {
  load_balancer_id = "clb-minr2d8brqps5smt1ax***"
  log_topic_id = "t45227e2e-5637-470b-a7e****"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `load_balancer_id` (String) CLB ID information that meets the criteria.
- `log_topic_id` (String) ID of the created log topic. You can call the DescribeTopics API to query the log topic ID.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
$ terraform import volcenginecc_clb_check_log_topic.example "load_balancer_id|log_topic_id"
```
